name: Container Build For HPC
summary: Plan and build Apptainer-compatible images for shared HPC systems.
description: This skill helps users prepare reproducible container definitions, choose site-approved build locations, record build metadata, and avoid expensive or policy-sensitive image builds on shared login filesystems.

inputs.name: definition_file
inputs.description: Apptainer/Singularity definition file or OCI source plan.

inputs.name: build_location
inputs.description: Site-approved filesystem for temporary build state and cache.

outputs.name: build_plan
outputs.description: Recorded build command, runtime, host, and filesystem assumptions.

outputs.name: container_image
outputs.description: Optional SIF image when the user explicitly opts into building.

examples.title: Record or run a container build plan

tests.description: Validate the manifest and referenced examples.
Run the build plan without BUILD_IMAGE, review the command, then build only on a site-approved build host or partition.
